item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Agent A remains society-prioritizing but softens toward balance by repeatedly stating that individual rights are not fully ignored. Agent B remains individual-rights-first but moves from a stronger rights-priority opening toward cultural-difference and balance language. No full reversal is visible. Language/script artifacts noted: Agent A turn 1 contains non-Latin '整体', and turn 3 uses 'social'.
